title: A public speaker doesn’t need a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## To work in Canada as a public speaker
You don’t need a work permit if you’re a guest speaker, commercial speaker or seminar leader who is speaking at specific events, provided the event is no longer than 5 days .
If the event is longer than 5 days , you need a work permit with a labour market impact assessment .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
